prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第2話　折り返して戻る. Scene focus: 第1節　水神社の石段 / サトーパート. Summary: 白鷺川沿いをしばらく進んだ先で、遊歩道は小さな水神社の脇へ出る。大きな名所というほどではないが、石段と社の影がちょうどよく、折り返しの区切りには向いていた。サトーはそこでいった… Key beats: 白鷺川沿いをしばらく進んだ先で、遊歩道は小さな水神社の脇へ出る。大きな名所というほどではないが、石段と社の影がちょうどよく、折り返しの区切りには向いていた。サトーはそこでいったん歩き、肩でひとつ深く息をした。走ってきた身体が静かに熱を持ち、その熱がようやくちょうどいいところへ収まりつつある。 石段の横でボトルの水をひと口飲む。社の屋根越しに見える桜は、河川敷の並木より少し濃く見えた。ここから戻れば、あとは身体が勝手に走ってくれる区間が多い。そう思うだけで気分が軽くなる。 社務所の裏手では、作業着姿の男が細長い収納ケースを運び、もう一人がサービス路地へ白い軽バンを少しだけ寄せていた。春祭りの支度か、掃除道具の入れ替えか、その程度の話だろう。小さな神社でも朝はいろいろ忙しいのだなと、サトーは勝手に納得した。 踵を返してもう一度川沿いを見る。朝日は上がり、川面はすっかり銀色になっていた。走りの前半がうまくいくと、折り返しはたいてい気分がいい。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-side first section of the shrine-turnaround incident paired with scene-002-002-002-sera. Keep the same small riverside shrine, stone steps, and turnaround mood in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Compose a quiet turnaround moment with Sato dominant near a small urban waterside shrine with stone steps, modest grounds, spring blossoms, and a calm breathing break before he turns back. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near the outer path, a tree shadow, or a service lane, never companion-like.
